title: Provider execution integration
description: Per-operator execution adapter manifest. Declares the active wire integration id and SDK billing/execution methods the adapter implements. Wire product codes remain in graph.json edges.wire; credentials are runtime config only.

adapter.description: Wire integration id; must match a key under graph.json edges.wire for this operator

items.description: Billing subservice method exposed when this integration is active
Postage execution subservice method exposed when this integration is active
